summary: Provision a brand-new Kinesis data stream. No curated Kinesis estate exists yet, so this is a first stand-up an engineer reviews before it applies.

operations.title: Provision a new Kinesis data stream
operations.summary: Request a brand-new Kinesis data stream; an engineer finalizes and reviews the Terraform before it applies.
operations.description: Stand up a data stream as a complete specification: capacity mode, retention, and encryption. Submitting routes it to an engineer with a draft Terraform block to review and finish — nothing is applied without review.

params.name: stream_name
params.label: Stream name
params.help: Names the stream producers and consumers connect to.

params.name: stream_mode
params.label: Capacity mode
params.help: ON_DEMAND scales automatically and bills per throughput; PROVISIONED uses a fixed shard count below.

params.name: shard_count
params.label: Shard count
params.help: Only applies in PROVISIONED mode; on-demand scales automatically.

params.name: retention_hours
params.label: Retention (hours)
params.help: How long records stay in the stream, 24 hours to 365 days.

params.name: encryption_type
params.label: Server-side encryption
params.help: KMS encrypts records at rest. Only turn this off for a legacy, unencrypted stream.

params.name: kms_key
params.label: Encryption key
params.help: Only applies when encryption is KMS. Leave blank to use the alias/aws/kinesis AWS-managed key; pick a key only for a customer-managed CMK.

params.name: resource_name
params.label: Stream name tag
params.help: Shown as the name everywhere — consoles, tickets, this portal.

params.name: description_tag
params.label: What this stream carries
params.help: One line an operator can act on at 3 AM.

params.name: pic
params.label: Person in charge
params.help: Who to call about this stream.

decisions: Enhanced fan-out consumers are an engineer follow-up after creation
Shard-level metrics beyond the defaults are an engineer decision
Warm throughput (provisioned capacity floor) is an engineer decision
